CustomField.description: Marker for B13 migration records. TRUE means this BusinessMilestone was generated by FscGoalMigrate from a legacy FinServ__FinancialGoal__c that classified as a commercial banking goal/event.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto-managed by FscGoalMigrate. TRUE means this is generated demo data; do not edit.
CustomField.label: Is Seeded Migration
